vocab.meaning: đắm chìm trong thế giới riêng
vocab.example: When I was sketching in my notebook as a child, I was completely lost in my own world.

vocab.word: to the top of one's bent
vocab.meaning: hết mức có thể, thỏa sức đam mê
vocab.example: During summer holidays, I used to play football with the neighborhood kids to the top of my bent.

vocab.meaning: có năng khiếu thiên bẩm về
vocab.example: Even as a toddler, I seemed to have a flair for storytelling, often making up elaborate tales for my toys.

vocab.meaning: tìm thấy niềm vui/sự thú vị từ
vocab.example: I really got a kick out of assembling complex Lego sets when I was in primary school.

vocab.meaning: mọi lúc mọi nơi, bất cứ khi nào có cơ hội
vocab.example: I was obsessed with swimming and would head to the local pool at every opportunity.

vocab.meaning: bắt đầu yêu thích cái gì (thường là rất nhanh)
vocab.example: I took a shine to playing chess after watching my grandfather play just once.

vocab.meaning: trở nên say mê/bị ám ảnh bởi một sở thích nào đó
vocab.example: I was bitten by the photography bug at age ten when my father gifted me an old film camera.

vocab.meaning: như cá gặp nước, ở trong môi trường yêu thích
vocab.example: Whenever I was out in the garden digging for fossils, I was truly in my element.

vocab.meaning: học những kỹ năng đầu tiên/bắt đầu trải nghiệm từ
vocab.example: I cut my teeth on simple coding languages by trying to build basic websites during my early teens.

vocab.meaning: có sự yêu mến đặc biệt (thường mang tính hoài niệm)
vocab.example: I’ve always had a soft spot for coin collecting, as it reminds me of the afternoons I spent with my dad.
